domains.name: trip_facts_raw

domains.name: station_snapshots_raw
domains.description: Station snapshots used by the warehouse bootstrap and enrichment logic.

external_dependencies.note: Legacy population enrichment expects a land-area reference file.

external_dependencies.name: metrolink_station_feed
external_dependencies.note: Legacy transit enrichment expects a Metrolink station export in a historical format.
